name: opencode-membrain
description: OpenCode plugin for persistent memory using Mem-Brain - an agentic memory system with semantic search and graph relationships

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node && bun build ./src/cli.ts --outfile ./dist/cli.js --target node && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push && git push --tags

author: Mem-Brain
